changes_vs_v1: Dan shortened from 10.95s to 6.45s (user feedback: too long)
Mervin renamed from Melvin (user feedback: spelling)
Mayank sync fix: dropped silenceremove from cut pipeline (was desyncing audio from video)
Added speakers 7 and 8 from IMG_1085 / IMG_1086
Captions: AA003-style terminal overlay (top-left agent toast + bottom subtitle panel with per-word reveal) instead of v1 drawtext name-strap

speakers.name: Dan
speakers.quote: I'm Dan and today we're building a Rube Goldberg machine that connects multiple phones together.

speakers.name: Luke Hubbard
speakers.quote: I'm Luke Hubbard, I'm here with my team, we're building Mirrorbase. Mirrorbase is an app that takes a copy of all your data out of the various web applications that you use.

speakers.name: Mayank
speakers.topic: skill to make web apps AI-ready
speakers.quote: My name is Mayank and I'm building a framework, kind of a skill, which would help your website or web app be AI ready.

speakers.name: Pushkar
speakers.quote: I'm Pushkar. I'm a researcher at NTU. And I'm building tools to accelerate research.

speakers.name: Mervin
speakers.quote: I'm Mervin and today I'm building something that's more relevant to businesses with customer services.

speakers.name: Arun
speakers.topic: reviewer agent . keeps agents on track
speakers.quote: My name is Arun. I'm making goal much better by having a reviewer side by side so that if it drifts from what it is doing, it will set it back on the track.

speakers.name: Nachika Freddy
speakers.topic: Lumina . AI SaaS for dev teams
speakers.quote: My name is Nachika Freddy and we are building an app called Lumina, it's an AI SaaS based application that is suited for developers.

speakers.name: Stephane
speakers.quote: My name is Stephane and I'm working on an improvement of the prediction markets automatic market making formula.
